results.recommendation: Ensure OS is fully patched and hardening guides are applied (CIS Benchmarks recommended).

results.detail: No commonly targeted ports detected as open on localhost.
results.recommendation: Close or firewall any unused ports. Disable Telnet (port 23) immediately.

results.detail: Potentially sensitive environment variables found: AWS_SECRET_KEY
results.recommendation: Never store passwords or API keys in environment variables in production. Use a secrets manager.
Always run supported software versions. Check python.org/downloads for the latest stable release.

results.detail: No sensitive file types found in C:\Windows\Temp.
results.recommendation: Regularly clear temp directories. Never store credentials or keys in temp folders.
